headline: Church & Dwight Announces Miss Mouth’s Messy Eater® Brand Acquisition
summary: EWING, N.J., May 29, 2026--Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) has signed and closed a definitive agreement to acquire the fast-growing Miss Mouth’s Messy Eater® brand for approximately $325 million. The brand has gained a rapid following among customers in need of fast-acting, non-toxic, on-the-spot stain removal across multiple surfaces. The transaction closed on May 28th.
